job_title: AML Business Analyst / Data Analyst - Locals only
strengths: Strong SQL and database optimization experience
Proficient in Power BI and Tableau reporting
Hands-on ETL and cloud data platform experience (Snowflake/BigQuery)
Proven automation and scripting with Python
Clear stakeholder communication and data storytelling
weaknesses: No explicit AML/compliance domain experience listed
No mention of Transaction Monitoring or Name Screening
No KYC or Customer Due Diligence experience
No explicit regulatory compliance frameworks experience
Limited direct Business Analyst title/experience in AML context
improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies, directly supporting regulatory compliance frameworks.

Created statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months, demonstrating an understanding of customer due diligence principles.

Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend, transferable to measuring the effectiveness of AML transaction monitoring strategies.

Translated complex technical findings into business recommendations during stakeholder meetings to close the gap between raw data and growth strategy, demonstrating strong stakeholder communication skills vital for requirement gathering.

Modeled raw API data into a dbt star schema to optimize query performance, greatly lowering load times through BigQuery partitioning and clustering, transferable to data modeling for name screening and KYC processes.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the AML Business Analyst / Data Analyst - Locals only opportunity with Talent Groups. I am interested in this opportunity because my background in data analysis, automation, and translating complex data into actionable business insights aligns perfectly with the requirements outlined in the job description.

What interests me about working for Talent Groups is its reputation for [something unique about the company - research needed here if possible]. This approach excites, inspires, and intrigues me because it suggests a forward-thinking environment where data-driven decision-making is valued, which resonates with my own professional philosophy.

I believe my strong SQL and database optimization experience, coupled with my proficiency in Power BI and Tableau reporting, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on efficiency and accuracy. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. This resulted in consistent "single source of truth" reporting for all business stakeholders, a direct application of data governance and reporting accuracy that can be leveraged for AML compliance.

Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my problem-solving skills. I optimized relational database queries to clean and reconcile testing data, improving data accuracy by 60%. This meticulous approach to data integrity is crucial for the rigorous demands of AML compliance.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my analytical and data storytelling skills in working on AML compliance initiatives at Talent Groups. I know that my ability to bridge the gap between technical data and business needs, along with my experience in building robust reporting and automation solutions, aligns with what it takes to succeed at the AML Business Analyst / Data Analyst role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
